title: Mise vision worker output
description: Structured per-photo vision signals. The shared contract BOTH Argus and the Qwen3-VL challenger must emit so the shadow/validation/cutover compare is apples-to-apples. Mirrors what app/qwen_writeback.parse_structured accepts and app/argus_writeback writes (assets.argus_*).

basename.description: Exact source file name; matched to a photo+ready asset of the gallery.

hero_potential.description: Hero-pick score in [0,1], or null. Top-N >= 0.5 form the gallery hero set.
